All results confirmed correct. eureka sb2=False is correct (pre-Spring project). BroadleafCommerce 100 confirmed correct (already on jakarta.*).

remaining_tasks.name: Fix key_dependencies=0 on BroadleafCommerce onboard
remaining_tasks.details: sourcecode onboard BroadleafCommerce returns key_dependencies: 0 despite being a major Maven multi-module Spring project. Investigate repository_ir.py dependency detection path — likely gap when --dependencies flag not explicitly passed.

remaining_tasks.name: MCP token budget caps
remaining_tasks.details: Add MAX_TOKENS_PER_TOOL dict to MCP server. Enforce truncation so Cursor stays under 10k tokens/tool limit. Affects get_agent_context, get_spring_audit, get_migration_readiness on large repos (keycloak: 5603 files). get_migration_readiness MCP tool is done; this is about output size safety.

decisions.decision: migrate-check reuses direct file regex scan (not contracts[].imports)
decisions.rationale: CIR skips wildcard imports (import javax.persistence.*;) at repository_ir.py:1016. Direct file regex catches both specific and wildcard imports. Used [ \t]* not \s* in regex to avoid newline consumption corrupting line number calculation.
Typer 0.24+ deprecates is_flag=True parameter. --ci/--no-ci bool flag pattern avoids deprecation warning.
Presentation/formatting logic belongs in the CLI layer. spring_findings.py stays a pure data model.

decisions.decision: MCP tool delegates to CLI via _execute() (not direct module import)
decisions.rationale: Consistent with all other MCP tools (get_spring_audit, get_endpoints, etc.). Avoids duplicating logic and keeps the single execution path.
Pre-Spring Boot project (raw Jersey + javax.servlet:servlet-api:2.5). 95 affected files. spring_boot_2_detected=False is technically correct — it never was Spring Boot 2.

repos_need_work: keycloak (3 residual javax.annotation in federation module, score 91)
migrate_check_real_repo_results.no_javax_persistence_in_test_set: All Spring Boot repos already on jakarta.* — MIG-001 (critical) only testable via synthetic fixtures

key_findings.ci_gate_output_example: sourcecode spring-audit . --ci --format github-comment → exit 1 + Markdown table on TX-001 violations
key_findings.mcp_tool_registered: get_migration_readiness() live in FastMCP server, curated alias in registry with when_to_call: guidance
